text.message: perhaps we could have made a deal, but I was too slow
do you go 843/8410? and we make some wheat for wood trades?
so annoying having a stuck hand
what is that to block me?
one for one is fair no?
just trying to get on the board
maybe u wanna trade despite it?
no u get a settle out of it
the only number i rolled is 2 and 3
what do u need to port?
yeah, don't block wheat and then sk for it
this is just to help u
but i want u in the game
all the trades you offer i cant
guess we have some of same cards
i have 2 sheep if that helps u port? but idk what you can offer me
got a lot to do and i dont think i have te time
they seem scary with uncontested road
yeah i was not paying attention
you weren't supposed to think on it
i think u knew i had it anyway
yeah, was hoping blue would say yes
we need some 2s so you can get road lol
you never had plow on their 6 ore?
blue just does not want me to play
I hope u don't trade red the road, because they might win with it
I mean, you're on 6 with two devs
so even if i had 2 vps still at 8
is leading if they don't trade you road
i dont get it but okay
?? that's a good block and yellow had n o cards
ofc and og goes unnoticed with 2 devs
yeah, you were saying oj was the threat the entire time
but after that its you and og ofc
we don't know their devs, so that's tough to say
likely some vps in the game
Oj didn't play knight for a long time
oh yeah that was weird i forgot about that
but maybe they made a mistake
i've been trying to give back
ugh, I was going to block the 4 if they weren't on 8
need to fade a big roll from yellow?
you are ahead and still prefered to not be fair
i offered it back so many tims
it was 2 sheep for a brick and i offered it back
what are you talking about red?
i did that so i get it back frree
the deal was to just reverse the trade and then you could port it instead
but you dont know how i guees
i have no idea what you mean tbh but i was trying to make it right
i trade wood for sheep brick and then i trade back wood for brick
we just had to reverse the trade we did it didn't have to be complicated
why should oj give a free card lol
yeah surre after i lose or before
and hope yellow doesn't get settle + vp
yeah but for this one round they are closer at least
i had winning rolls multiple turns :/
